name: GOLFTEC Buffalo
about: GOLFTEC Buffalo is a high-tech golf training center that specializes in data-driven golf lessons, club fitting, and practice using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors. Lessons are personalized and structured around a student's goals, with certified PGA coaches providing feedback to improve swing mechanics and on-course performance. The facility is designed to offer a focused learning environment, suitable for golfers looking for structured improvement, rather than casual play.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized coaching with data-driven feedback using OPTIMOTION and launch monitor technology
All-in-one service offering lessons, club fitting, and practice memberships for complete game improvement
Convenient indoor facilities allowing for year-round practice and learning regardless of weather

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, or they can be provided as part of the lesson or fitting experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No external food or drink is mentioned as being allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on lessons and practice, not full 18-hole simulation, so this is not applicable.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is suitable for juniors and youth with specific programs and coaching available.
